prompt: 프로젝트 메인 페이지에 쓸 로고 아이콘 하나 만들어줘. 파란색 계열로 미니멀한 느낌, 크기는 256x256 정도면 돼. public/images/logo.png로 저장해줘

assertions.name: image-file-created
assertions.check: output directory contains at least one image file (png/jpg/webp)

assertions.name: script-no-error
assertions.check: transcript shows no ERROR lines and script exited successfully

assertions.name: english-prompt-used
assertions.check: the command used an English prompt (not Korean) for better quality

assertions.name: correct-output-path
assertions.check: image was saved to the specified outputs directory
